overview: A modern SaaS-style AI Insights dashboard for tracking smart energy consumption, featuring interactive charts, behavioral recommendations, and dynamic time-range analysis — all powered by mock data and ready for real API integration.
features: Fixed navbar and collapsible sidebar with AI Insights active state
SummaryBanner with purple gradient, time range selector (7d/30d/90d), and estimated savings
Usage Trend card with dual-line chart comparing current vs previous period
Peak Usage Time bar chart with purple-highlighted peak bar and summary stats
Top Energy Drivers with color-coded stacked progress bars and legend
Behavioral Advice card with 4 toggleable recommendations and live projected savings
Loading skeleton states with simulated delay
